mapper.insert: INSERT INTO note_index (note_id, index_number, start_index, end_index, title, body) VALUES (#{noteId}, #{indexNumber}, #{startIndex}, #{endIndex}, #{title}, #{body})
mapper.update: UPDATE note_index SET title = #{title} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE note_index SET body = #{body} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM note_index WHERE note_id = #{noteId} ORDER BY index_number ASC
SELECT note_id FROM note_index WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO note_index (note_id, index_number, start_index, end_index, title, body) VALUES
(#{idx.noteId}, #{idx.indexNumber}, #{idx.startIndex}, #{idx.endIndex}, #{idx.title}, #{idx.body})
